ul.li: Managed Buffer Pool: 8,192 frames @ 2048B each (16MB Total)
Descriptor Count: 2,048 (Power of 2 for bitwise wrapping)
Bus Width Alignment: 64-byte aligned (Cache Line Size)

div.p: To eliminate L1/L2 False Sharing (Cache Line Bouncing), the producer_idx and consumer_idx are isolated on distinct cache lines.

ul.li: Producer writes to CL0, reads CL1 (cached).
Consumer writes to CL1, reads CL0 (cached).

ol.li: base_addr (64-bit): Physical pointer to packet buffer.
data_len (32-bit): Actual payload size in bytes.
flags (32-bit): Bitmask for checksum, VLAN, and offload metadata.
